opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Boise Comfort Systems has no booking button, no online booking tools, and is phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: After-hours HVAC emergencies in Boise go unbooked, sending leads directly to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 scheduling widget to capture after-hours HVAC service requests automatically.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on the site.
opportunities.observation: Boise's hot summers and cold winters create ideal seasonal tune-up demand that goes untapped.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal HVAC maintenance reminders via SMS and email before Boise's summer and winter peaks.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM Automation
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; business is entirely phone-only with no digital intake.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call is permanently lost with no follow-up or record kept.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to automatically record, transcribe, and follow up every inbound call.
